reviews.review_description: So I just got this game and I played it for 40mins strieght! And  I love about this game is that I'm already good at the game so that's why it's so fun and the way that you can climb up the walls and run super fast makes it so good and I love couse it's addicting to me and i had a sweatshirt on the whole time so I was super hot and I like the heat so it made it so fun and good and I wanted to play this game longer than 40 mins so next time I play this game I'll play it for 1h and also I met a moderator but the bad thing about that is that I dint get to talk to him because my mic was off 10000 stars ⭐  the best game ever!!!!!!

It is a pretty good game, its all og. No mods, no flying, just og. But the reason im giving it a 3 star is because i got banned 2 times, one for making a minigames code called nig1 ( i wasn't trying to make a bad word) and got banned, and the other time i was playing and cooking with one arm until some kid said i was cheating and spamed the report button and got banned for 900 HOURS FOR CHEATING, LIKE BRUH. So be careful with what you do. ( thanks for reading! hopefully this helps you!)
this game gives you long arms and little Mosa speed for comp and they switch updates every week and they  also have a nice owner

this is a really good game with really good staff including me 
We have long arms working severs and we update the game every week the game is really good try it
